name: Archive_Inc

sections.intro:
Archive, Inc.is the firstislandin the gameInto the Breach.  It is led by CEODewey Almsand has a Temperate environment.
Upon creation of a new save file Archive, Inc is always available.
sections.Map:
The Museum Island of Archive, Inc. is made up of 8 regions numbered 0 to 7. Region numbers are fixed, but region names are randomized. Ignore the colors on the map. The location of the Corporate HQ is always randomized.
Missions can be attempted in 4 Regions before a Hive Leader attempts to destroy the Corporate HQ.
Regions must be unlocked by attempting to complete the objectives in an adjacent region.
In the example map, Region 0 was the Corporate HQ. Regions 2 and 6 are unlocked because those regions are adjacent to the Corporate HQ. Selecting the mission in Region 2 unlocked Regions 1 and 3. The mission in Region 6 unlocked Region 4 and the mission in Region 4 unlocked Regions 5 and 7. Having attempted the missions in Regions 2, 6, 4 and 5, seismic activity by the Vek attacking the Corporate HQ destroys Regions 1, 3, and 7.
  - Region map of Archive, Inc. island
sections.Island-Specific Missions: Advanced Edition missions are only encounterable if "Advanced Missions" are on for a timeline.
sections.Reputation Objectives:
- Defend the Artillery Support: 1ReputationAn ally and player-controllable Artillery Support is present at the start of the mission. It has two health, one movement and attacks by targeting two tiles with artillery range.
  - Destroy the Dam: 1ReputationA two-tile wideOld Earth Damsits near a cluster of mountains. Destroying it converts a wide line of tiles into water, obstructing Vek movement.
  - Defend the Train: 2ReputationA two-tile longSupply Trainnamed Ol' Horace moves from one end of the map to another. If the train collides with anything or is damaged, it becomes adamaged trainand one reputation point is lost. Damage it again and the train is destroyed entirely, yielding no reputation.Lasts 4 turns instead of 5.Also present onR.S.T. CorporationandDetritus Disposal.
  - Defend the Satellite Launches: 2Reputation, 1 for each satelliteTwo stationary satellites with 2 health each sit at random locations on the map. Every second player turn, one of them will prepare to launch, earning 1 reputation point and destroying anything next to it.
  - Defend the Tank: 2Reputation, 1  for each tankTwo inactive light tanks sit at random locations of the map. These light tanks have 1 health and can only push enemies. On the second-to-last turn each tank will activate if they survive.
  - Defend the Armored Train (Advanced Edition): 2ReputationSame conditions apply as the normal train mission except that Ol' Horace is armored and instantly kills anything it rams into without taking damage (unless it is a Mech).Exclusive to this island.Lasts 4 turns instead of 5.
  - Use 3 Repair Platforms (Advanced Edition): 1ReputationMechs or ally units must use at least 3 repair platforms scattered across the map, which disappear and instantly restore units back to full health. Vek are also capable of using them.Always paired with theBad Repairsenvironmental condition, which has Mechs start the mission with 1 health.
  - End with 8 spaces on fire (Advanced Edition): 2ReputationThe map has a massive amount of forest tiles.1 reputation is awarded for partial completion of burning at least 4 tiles.
sections.Environmental Conditions:
- Air SupportDuring the player turn a cross-shaped section of the map is marked for bombing. Before enemies attack, a group of Bombers will fly in and bomb all marked tiles, instantly killinganything caught in the attack.
  - Tidal WavesDuring the environment step the edge of the map will become water tiles, drowning any Vek standing on them.Cannot appear with any double-reputation objectives.Makes the mission last 4 turns instead of 5.
  - MinesAt the start of the mission the ground is littered with mines that instantly killanything that steps on them.TheBlast PsionandTumblebugsof any variant are not allowed to spawn if this environmental condition is present.
  - Bad Repairs (Advanced Edition)All Mechs start the mission with 1 health.Always paired with theUse 3 Repair Platformsobjective.

full_text:
Archive, Inc.
Details
CEO
Dewey Alms
Environment
Temperate
“
This Museum Island recreates Old Earth as it was before the oceans rose and nearly wiped out humanity.
„
Archive, Inc.
is the first
island
in the game
Into the Breach
.  It is led by CEO
Dewey Alms
and has a Temperate environment.
Upon creation of a new save file Archive, Inc is always available.
Contents
1
Map
2
Island-Specific Missions
2.1
Reputation Objectives
2.2
Environmental Conditions
3
Region names
Map
[
]
The Museum Island of Archive, Inc. is made up of 8 regions numbered 0 to 7. Region numbers are fixed, but region names are randomized. Ignore the colors on the map. The location of the Corporate HQ is always randomized.
Missions can be attempted in 4 Regions before a Hive Leader attempts to destroy the Corporate HQ.
Regions must be unlocked by attempting to complete the objectives in an adjacent region.
In the example map, Region 0 was the Corporate HQ. Regions 2 and 6 are unlocked because those regions are adjacent to the Corporate HQ. Selecting the mission in Region 2 unlocked Regions 1 and 3. The mission in Region 6 unlocked Region 4 and the mission in Region 4 unlocked Regions 5 and 7. Having attempted the missions in Regions 2, 6, 4 and 5, seismic activity by the Vek attacking the Corporate HQ destroys Regions 1, 3, and 7.
Region map of Archive, Inc. island
Island-Specific Missions
[
]
Advanced Edition missions are only encounterable if "Advanced Missions" are on for a timeline.
Reputation Objectives
[
]
Defend the Artillery Support: 1
Reputation
An ally and player-controllable Artillery Support is present at the start of the mission. It has two health, one movement and attacks by targeting two tiles with artillery range.
Destroy the Dam: 1
Reputation
A two-tile wide
Old Earth Dam
sits near a cluster of mountains. Destroying it converts a wide line of tiles into water, obstructing Vek movement.
Defend the Train: 2
Reputation
A two-tile long
Supply Train
named Ol' Horace moves from one end of the map to another. If the train collides with anything or is damaged, it becomes a
damaged train
and one reputation point is lost. Damage it again and the train is destroyed entirely, yielding no reputation.
Lasts 4 turns instead of 5.
Also present on
R.S.T. Corporation
and
Detritus Disposal
.
Defend the Satellite Launches: 2
Reputation, 1 for each satellite
Two stationary satellites with 2 health each sit at random locations on the map. Every second player turn, one of them will prepare to launch, earning 1 reputation point and destroying anything next to it.
Defend the Tank: 2
Reputation, 1  for each tank
Two inactive light tanks sit at random locations of the map. These light tanks have 1 health and can only push enemies. On the second-to-last turn each tank will activate if they survive.
Defend the Armored Train (
Advanced Edition)
: 2
Reputation
Same conditions apply as the normal train mission except that Ol' Horace is armored and instantly kills anything it rams into without taking damage (unless it is a Mech).
Exclusive to this island.
Lasts 4 turns instead of 5.
Use 3 Repair Platforms (
Advanced Edition)
: 1
Reputation
Mechs or ally units must use at least 3 repair platforms scattered across the map, which disappear and instantly restore units back to full health. Vek are also capable of using them.
Always paired with the
Bad Repairs
environmental condition, which has Mechs start the mission with 1 health.
End with 8 spaces on fire (
Advanced Edition)
: 2
Reputation
The map has a massive amount of forest tiles.
1 reputation is awarded for partial completion of burning at least 4 tiles.
Environmental Conditions
[
]
Air Support
During the player turn a cross-shaped section of the map is marked for bombing. Before enemies attack, a group of Bombers will fly in and bomb all marked tiles, instantly killing
anything caught in the attack.
Tidal Waves
During the environment step the edge of the map will become water tiles, drowning any Vek standing on them.
Cannot appear with any double-reputation objectives.
Makes the mission last 4 turns instead of 5.
Mines
At the start of the mission the ground is littered with mines that instantly kill
anything that steps on them.
The
Blast Psion
and
Tumblebugs
of any variant are not allowed to spawn if this environmental condition is present.
Bad Repairs (
Advanced Edition
)
All Mechs start the mission with 1 health.
Always paired with the
Use 3 Repair Platforms
objective.
Region names
[
]
As all region names are randomized, the following list is included for completion.
